title: passiflora citrifolia
intro: Passiflora citrifolia, also known as the yellow passionflower, is a species of flowering plant in the passionflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which can help to soothe anxiety and insomnia. The plant is also believed to have several health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. Passiflora citrifolia can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
